programs.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programs.desc: The NCIS team investigates a cold case involving WWII-era bones on the 80th anniversary of the Pearl Harbour bombings, and are shocked to learn they belong to a 100-year-old survivor of the attack.

programs.title: Girlfriends' Guide To Divorce
programs.desc: Abby hosts a party for the baseball team’s parents while trying to keep her relationship with Mike quiet. Barbara gets more than a new stovetop when she meets contractor Darrell to remodel her kitchen.

programs.title: Army Wives
programs.desc: Denise tries to help Tanya move on with life after Jeremy. Roxy is close to opening the truck stop for business. Claudia Joy has a hard time adjusting to how she and Michael are being treated on post.

programs.title: Army Wives
programs.desc: The tribe prepares to leave Fort Marshall and go their separate ways. Roxy has a hard time adjusting to the idea of moving. Amid the base closing, Joan is busy getting the fort ready for an incoming hurricane.

programs.title: Army Wives
programs.desc: In the aftermath of the hurricane, one Army wife fights for her life, another searches for a place to live after her apartment building is destroyed and Joan gets overwhelmed trying to manage the after-effects of the storm.

programs.title: It's Academic
programs.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.
